Python Dependencies (Flask, SQLAlchemy, Flask-Login, Flask-Mail, PyMySQL)
Poway Neighborhood Emergency Corps — Community Emergency Preparedness Platform
Auth API (/api/auth) — login, register, logout, profile
FAQ API (/api/faq) — categories, items, search, helpful votes, user questions
Events API (/api/events) — list, calendar view, create
Media API (/api/media) — paginated media posts, upload
Risk API (/api/risk) — live Poway hazard assessment (fire/flood/heat) via Open-Meteo
Neighborhoods API (/api/neighborhoods) — 60+ Poway neighborhoods with coordinator info
Game API (/api/game) — preparedness quiz questions and scoring
Role Hierarchy: resident < coordinator < staff < admin
Database: SQLite (dev) / MySQL via PyMySQL (prod), auto-seeded with FAQs and neighborhoods
Architecture: SRP + Orchestrator/Worker pattern — thin routes delegate to service workers
TM_Flask — companion Flask REST API (same pattern, different domain/data)
Profile image: 'hop' — black-and-white official portrait of a woman in US Navy uniform with service ribbons, American flag in background (resembles Grace Hopper)
Profile image: 'niko' — vintage black-and-white portrait of a young man with mustache in formal attire (resembles Nikola Tesla)
Default profile image: cartoon illustration of Wilma Flintstone (The Flintstones character) — used as fallback user avatar
